title: FDA Compliance
description: FDA regulations, variance applications, incident reporting, and Laser Notice 50 compliance

modules.title: FDA Variance Applications
modules.description: Procedures for submitting and maintaining FDA variance applications for laser light shows and laser products
learning_objectives: Understand the variance application requirements for laser light shows
Identify required forms and documentation for variance submissions
Know the annual reporting requirements and deadlines

modules.title: FDA Laser Incident Reporting
modules.description: Procedures and requirements for reporting laser-related incidents and injuries to FDA
learning_objectives: Understand when laser incidents must be reported to FDA

pdfs_processed.note: Content derived from standard FDA procedures
